notableEvents.label: Shay Whitcomb pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Shay Whitcomb flies out to second baseman Cole Young.

notableEvents.label: Julio Rodríguez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Julio Rodríguez grounds into a double play, shortstop Braden Shewmake to first baseman Christian Walker. Brendan Donovan out at 2nd. Julio Rodríguez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Canzone grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Canzone hits a grand slam (4) to right field. Randy Arozarena scores. Luke Raley scores. J.P. Crawford scores.
